items.title: England tried to use ‘Trump rule’ to get Jarell Quansah’s World Cup ban suspended, only for Fifa to make it LONGER
items.summary: ENGLAND tried to use the same argument for Jarell Quansah's red card ban as USA made for Folarin Balogun. items.title: Spurs make offer for Kolo Muani - Friday gossip
items.summary: Tottenham make an offer for Randal Kolo Muani but Juventus remain favourites to sign the forward, Arsenal are ready to finalise a deal for Christos Tzolis, Marcus Rashford's future at Barcelona could be in doubt, plus more.

items.title: England Lionesses hero Chloe Kelly labelled ‘the absolute best’ as she chills out in pink bikini on sunshine holiday
items.summary: CHLOE KELLY wowed fans as she soaked up the sun on a luxurious beach getaway. The Lionesses hero, 28, endured an injury-ravaged season after joining Arsenal from rivals Manchester City last summer. And she's determined to get back to her red-hot form, putting in the hard yards on her summer holiday.

items.title: ‘There is a magnificent balance’: how Spain built a record-breaking defence
items.summary: The Spain goalkeeper Unai Simón has not conceded a goal at the World Cup and, worryingly for Belgium, he has not had to face that many shots “We’re the villains, there to stop the goals that football lives off,” Unai Simón says. items.title: Belgium star BANNED from facing Spain in World Cup quarter-final as huge club vs country row ignited
items.summary: BELGIUM’S quarter-final preparations have been hit by a club versus country row over Zeno Debast. The defender’s club, Sporting Lisbon, have banned him from playing against Spain because of a disagreement over his fitness. And the Belgian FA have confirmed Debast will not be available for the match.

items.title: Norway's Haaland calls for media pressure on England before quarter-final
items.summary: Norway striker Erling Haaland says all the pressure is on England before the two sides' World Cup quarter-final on Saturday.

items.title: ‘This is rigged’ – World Cup fans fume at controversial referee team as Mbappe misses penalty after insane delay
items.summary: FANS reckon the World Cup is "rigged" after Argentinian refs made Kylian Mbappe wait over three minutes to take a stone-wall penalty. items.title: England stars reveal how Jarell Quansah reacted to extended World Cup ban after Mexico red card
items.summary: JARELL QUANSAH is "not happy" with his two-game ban. The England defender, 23, was clobbered with the lengthy suspension after being sent off following a VAR review for fouling Jesus Gallardo in Sunday's 3-2 win over Mexico in the last-16. items.summary: England defender Jarell Quansah receives a two-match ban for his red card against Mexico.

items.summary: KYLIAN MBAPPE consoled Morocco opponents after leading France to the World Cup semi-finals with a dominant display.
